### Give marketers control without adding complexity.

Iterable helps your team act on customer behavior without relying on engineering or rebuilding workflows.

Create audiences, coordinate messaging across channels, and adjust in real time — all within a system designed to hold up as your needs grow.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/journeys-technical-scale.png)

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/journeys-next-best-action.png)

### Know what to send. Know when to send it.

Iterable uses AI to interpret live customer behavior and guide your next move — so every message reflects current intent, not guesswork.  
  
Optimize timing, frequency, and channel selection without relying on rigid rules or manual updates.

### Act on your data — without waiting on engineering.

Iterable gives marketers direct access to the data they need to personalize and respond in real time.

Connect your data warehouse, product data, and behavioral signals into one system — so teams can build audiences and act on them without constant engineering support.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/product-segmentation.png)

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/whats-new-sms-toolkit.png)

### A partner from setup to scale.

Iterable doesn’t just get you live — we help you build a system that works in the real world.

From onboarding through ongoing optimization, our team supports you as your needs evolve — with guidance you can rely on and support whenever you need it.
